title: Choose Irvine
original_title: Beyond Trainspotting: The World of Irvine Welsh
overview: After his pivotal novel Trainspotting was published in 1993, the debut work of Irvine Welsh quickly took the world by storm, spawning theatre productions, the iconic film by Danny Boyle, sequels and even an acclaimed stage musical.
